leadText: If you were looking for the item in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness, see Machine Part (Orre). The Machine Part (Japanese: きかいのぶひん Machine Part) is a Key Item introduced in Generation II.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Gold, Silver , Crystal , HeartGold, and SoulSilver , the Machine Part allows the staff of the Power Plant to resume operations, restoring function to the Magnet Train and Lavender Radio Tower . The Power Plant manager will also give the player a TM07 ( Zap Cannon ) G S C / TM57 ( Charge Beam ) HG SS as a thanks for returning it.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C A machine part for the Power Plant . HG SS B W B2 W2 An important machine part for the Power Plant that was stolen. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V An important part of a machine that was stolen from the Power Plant.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method G S C Cerulean Gym (hidden in water in the middle of the Gym, after visiting the Power Plant) HG SS Cerulean Gym (hidden behind a pile of lifebuoys, after defeating the Team Rocket Grunt on Route 24 )

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver , the Machine Part does not show up on the Dowsing MCHN despite being a hidden item.
